12:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Memory Confidence: Veracity Signal"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne supports a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"veracity"}]," field for every memory so you know how trustworthy it is. Not all memories are created equal: something you explicitly stated deserves more weight than something the AI inferred from context."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Confidence Levels"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Level"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Meaning"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Weight"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"stated"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"You explicitly said this"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"1.0x"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"inferred"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"AI deduced from context"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.7x"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"tool"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Automated system output"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.5x"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"imported"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Cross-provider import"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.6x"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"unknown"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Legacy or uncategorized"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.8x"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Why It Matters"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"AI agents store a lot of inferred and tool-generated memories. Over time, these can drown out what you actually said. Veracity lets you:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Weight direct user statements higher than AI inferences in recall"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Filter queries to only your explicit preferences"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Review and audit inferred memories periodically"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Track contamination in your memory system"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Without veracity signals, a joke you made about liking Haskell could rank equally with your explicit preference for Python."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Writing With Confidence"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"# Explicit user statement\nmem.remember(\"Dark mode is preferred\", veracity=\"stated\")\n\n# AI inference\nmem.remember(\"User likely prefers dark mode based on theme choices\", veracity=\"inferred\")\n\n# Tool output\nmem.remember(\"Deploy succeeded at 3:14 PM\", veracity=\"tool\")\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Recalling With Confidence Filters"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"# Only get things I explicitly said\nresults = mem.recall(\"preference\", veracity=\"stated\")\n\n# Only tool outputs\nresults = mem.recall(\"deploy\", veracity=\"tool\")\n\n# Everything, unfiltered\nresults = mem.recall(\"preference\")  # no veracity filter\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How Recall Weighting Works"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["During ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}],", each result's score gets multiplied by its veracity weight:"]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["A ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stated"}]," memory with score 0.9 stays 0.9"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["An ",["$","code",null,{"children":"inferred"}]," memory with score 0.9 becomes 0.63"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["A ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tool"}]," memory becomes 0.45"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Inferred memories need to be much more semantically relevant to surface above stated ones. The system still surfaces inferences when they're genuinely relevant, but they start at a disadvantage."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"get_contaminated(): Audit Your Memory"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"# Get all non-stated memories for review\ncontaminated = mem.get_contaminated(limit=50)\n\nfor m in contaminated:\n    print(f\"[{m['veracity']}] {m['content'][:100]}\")\n    # Review and optionally promote\n"}]}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le"],["$Lf"],"$L10"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"bLdIFQuLJKVWSPykPPUJl"}
3:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns episodic memories where veracity is NOT ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stated"}],". Sorted by importance descending so the most impactful contamination surfaces first."]}]
4:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Configuration"}]
5:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"MNEMOSYNE_STATED_WEIGHT=1.0\nMNEMOSYNE_INFERRED_WEIGHT=0.7\nMNEMOSYNE_TOOL_WEIGHT=0.5\nMNEMOSYNE_IMPORTED_WEIGHT=0.6\nMNEMOSYNE_UNKNOWN_WEIGHT=0.8\n"}]}]
6:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Migration"}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":["New databases get the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"veracity"}]," column via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE TABLE"}],". Existing databases get it via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ALTER TABLE"}]," migration in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"init_beam()"}],". All existing rows default to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"unknown"}],". No data loss, fully backward compatible."]}]
8:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Combined With Tiers"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"Veracity and tier degradation work together:"}]
a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["A tier-3 (cold) + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stated"}],": 0.25 x 1.0 = 0.25 total weight"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["A tier-3 (cold) + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tool"}],": 0.25 x 0.5 = 0.125 total weight"]}],"\n"]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"You control both dimensions independently."}]
c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Practical Example: Preference Cleanup"}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"# I told my agent: \"I prefer Python over JavaScript\"\nmem.remember(\"User prefers Python over JavaScript\", veracity=\"stated\")\n\n# Agent later inferred: \"User seems to like Haskell\" based on a joke\nmem.remember(\"User seems to like Haskell\", veracity=\"inferred\")\n\n# Four days later...\nwhat_i_said = mem.recall(\"language preference\", veracity=\"stated\")\n# Returns my real preference, not the joke-inference\n\n# Quarterly audit\nsuspect = mem.get_contaminated()\nfor s in suspect:\n    if confirm_with_user(s[\"content\"]):\n        mem.update(s[\"id\"], veracity=\"stated\")\n    else:\n        mem.forget(s[\"id\"])\n"}]}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Audit tip:"}]," Run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"get_contaminated()"}]," as part of a weekly or monthly cleanup. Inferred memories pile up quietly. A quick audit keeps your memory system aligned with what you actually believe and prefer."]}]
f:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01o_465-h6ryu.js","async":true}]
10:["$","$L11",null,{"children":["$","$12",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@13"}]}]
